name: @pryzm/physics-host
description: PRYZM 3 — Physics-host slot owner. PHASE-1A deliverable per `docs/03_PRYZM3/reference/phases/PHASE-1/1A-SKELETON-RAILS.md`. Hosts the broad-phase spatial query backend (raycast / AABB / point-in-volume) consumed by the renderer + tool layer through `runtime.physicsHost.*`. Phase 1A ships a Null backend; the WASM/Three.js BVH backend lands in Phase 1D. D.4.3 adds the bootstrap surface (typed contract + OTel span + PhysicsStepper).
